intentSynonyms: get a page children in confluence
look up a page children in confluence
fetch a single page children in confluence
view one specific page children in confluence
list child pages of a page in confluence
description: List the child pages of a Confluence page. Useful for navigating the page tree.

limit.description: Maximum number of children to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
